apps.name: Coinzy
apps.description: Coinzy uses advanced AI to identify coins from around the world. Scan any coin, explore its history, rarity, and estimated value. Build your collection and trade on the marketplace.

features.title: AI Coin Scanner
features.description: Point your camera at any coin for instant identification.

features.title: Rich History
features.description: Explore detailed historical data, minting info, and rarity.

features.title: Marketplace
features.description: Buy and sell coins in a trusted community marketplace.

features.title: Rarity Analysis
features.description: Get estimated value and rarity classification instantly.

showcase.title: Marketplace
showcase.description: Buy and sell coins with collectors

showcase.title: Collection Tracking
showcase.description: Organize and manage your coin collection

showcase.title: Coin Value Insights
showcase.description: Know the real value of your coins

showcase.title: 250K+ Coins Database
showcase.description: Explore a massive global coin catalog

apps.name: Banknotes
apps.tagline: Scan and identify banknotes from around the world
apps.description: Banknotes uses advanced image recognition to identify banknotes from around the world. Learn about currency history, security features, and exchange rates instantly.

features.title: AI Banknote Scanner
features.description: Scan any banknote and get instant identification results.

features.title: Global Coverage
features.description: Supports banknotes from countries across the world.

features.title: Rarity & Value
features.description: Discover rarity, estimated price, and circulation status.

features.title: History & Design
features.description: Explore detailed history, design elements, and materials.

apps.name: Insecto
apps.tagline: Discover insects and learn about them instantly
apps.description: Point your camera at any insect and Insecto will identify it instantly. Get detailed information about species, habitat, behavior, and whether they are beneficial or harmful.

features.title: AI Identification
features.description: Instantly identify any insect with your camera.

features.title: Explore by Category
features.description: Browse popular, toxic, pests, and location-specific insects.

features.title: Detailed Profiles
features.description: Get toxicity info, bite photos, and behavioral data.

features.title: Build Collection
features.description: Save identified insects and build your personal catalogue.

apps.name: Habiteazy
apps.tagline: Build positive habits and stay consistent
apps.description: Habiteazy makes habit building simple and rewarding. Track your streaks, set reminders, and visualize your progress with beautiful charts and motivational insights.

features.title: Streak Tracking
features.description: Stay motivated with daily streak counts and fire badges.

features.title: Smart Scheduling
features.description: Set flexible reminders and weekly habit plans.

features.title: Visual Progress
features.description: See your journey with beautiful charts and statistics.

features.title: Fun Companion
features.description: Your virtual pet grows as you build better habits.

showcase.title: Habit Tracking
showcase.description: Track your daily habits and stay consistent

showcase.title: Task Management
showcase.description: Manage your daily to-do tasks efficiently

showcase.title: Statistics & Reports
showcase.description: View colorful graphs and progress insights

showcase.title: Your Personal Pal
showcase.description: Stay motivated with your companion throughout the journey

apps.name: Rockzy
apps.description: Scan, collect, and explore over 8,000+ rocks and minerals with powerful AI tools. Identify rocks instantly, chat with AI, and build your collection.

features.title: AI Rock Identification
features.description: Scan and identify any rock or mineral instantly using AI.

features.title: AI Chat Assistant
features.description: Ask questions and learn about rocks, minerals, and crystals.

features.title: Collection Tracking
features.description: Organize owned, identified, and wishlist minerals.

features.title: Global Mineral Catalogue
features.description: Explore thousands of rocks and minerals worldwide.

showcase.title: Collection & Mineral Care
showcase.description: Track and maintain your mineral collection

showcase.title: Zodiac Stones
showcase.description: Discover crystals linked to your zodiac
